final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing marketing poster for a Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) cover image featuring the DJI Pocket 4 camera.

Style/medium: Xiaohongshu creator aesthetic, authentic amateur (素人) style, playful and approachable visual language, flat illustration with subtle depth
Composition: 9-grid layout structure, centered title placement, product hero shot in focal zone, vertical mobile-optimized format
Subject: DJI Pocket 4 camera as the featured product, displayed naturally as if in casual everyday use
Scene/backdrop: clean minimal backdrop suggesting personal content creator space, soft neutral tones
Lighting/mood: bright natural daylight feel, friendly and inviting, approachable creator energy
Color palette: soft pastels with one accent color for product highlight, warm and welcoming tones
Text (verbatim): "大强pocket4初体验"
Constraints: font must be cute and differentiated; must read clearly as Xiaohongshu cover thumbnail at small size; maintain authentic amateur creator aesthetic without overly polished commercial look
Avoid: stock photo aesthetic; generic sans-serif fonts; overly corporate styling; cluttered layout; professional studio lighting clichés
